records.title: Overall equipment effectiveness
records.summary: Track OEE across production lines to identify availability, performance, and quality losses.
records.metric_definition: Availability × Performance × Quality, expressed as a percentage.
records.methodology_note: Use shift-level granularity and exclude planned downtime from availability denominator.

records.title: First-pass yield rate
records.summary: Measure the percentage of units passing quality inspection without rework on first attempt, by product line and work centre.
records.metric_definition: Units passing first inspection divided by total units started.

records.title: Digital twin auditability
records.summary: Ensure digital twin models maintain traceable lineage between physical sensor data, simulation parameters, and predicted outcomes.

records.title: Supply chain resilience standards
records.summary: Maintain multi-tier visibility into supplier risk, lead-time variability, and inventory buffers to absorb disruption without production stoppage.

records.title: Connected product monetization
records.summary: Shift from one-time product sales to recurring service revenue by monetizing IoT data through outcome-based and predictive maintenance offerings.

records.title: Sustainability-driven value chain optimization
records.summary: Embed carbon tracking and circular-economy metrics into production planning to meet ESG targets while preserving margin.

records.title: Favor use cases that leverage real-time sensor data for production decisions
records.summary: Prioritize use cases that act on streaming IoT and SCADA data for real-time production decisions — OEE alerts, quality holds, predictive maintenance triggers — rather than batch-only analyses that miss time-critical intervention windows.

records.title: Bridge engineering, manufacturing, and service data for closed-loop quality
records.summary: Prefer use cases that connect design parameters, production measurements, and field warranty claims into a closed-loop quality feedback system, enabling root cause analysis that spans the full product lifecycle.
